meaning: n.回答者,回应者n.[电] 应答器,响应器
examples: The responder then sends the response to that destination.
The request might not have been delivered to the responder.
Each twin of a pair played the ultimatum game, both as proposer and as responder.
If the answer is yes, the responder is considered in the labor force and employed.
Construction jobs, manufacturing jobs, first-responder jobs -- all well-paying middle-class jobs, will get cut.
